code: import{createSlice,createAsyncThunk}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';import axios from'axios';const API='/api/jobs';const getHeaders=()=>({Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))});export const fetchJobs=createAsyncThunk('jobs/fetchAll',async function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const query=new URLSearchParams(params).toString();const res=await axios.get("".concat(API,"?").concat(query));return res.data;});export const fetchJobById=createAsyncThunk('jobs/fetchOne',async id=>{const res=await axios.get("".concat(API,"/").concat(id));return res.data;});export const createJob=createAsyncThunk('jobs/create',async(data,_ref)=>{let rejectWithValue=_ref.rejectWithValue;try{const res=await axios.post(API,data,{headers:getHeaders()});return res.data;}catch(err){var _err$response,_err$response$data;return rejectWithValue(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:(_err$response$data=_err$response.data)===null||_err$response$data===void 0?void 0:_err$response$data.message)||'Failed to post job');}});export const fetchMyJobs=createAsyncThunk('jobs/myJobs',async()=>{const res=await axios.get("".concat(API,"/recruiter/myjobs"),{headers:getHeaders()});return res.data;});export const deleteJob=createAsyncThunk('jobs/delete',async id=>{await axios.delete("".concat(API,"/").concat(id),{headers:getHeaders()});return id;});const jobSlice=createSlice({name:'jobs',initialState:{jobs:[],myJobs:[],currentJob:null,total:0,pages:1,loading:false,error:null},reducers:{clearCurrentJob:state=>{state.currentJob=null;}},extraReducers:builder=>{builder.addCase(fetchJobs.pending,state=>{state.loading=true;}).addCase(fetchJobs.fulfilled,(state,action)=>{state.loading=false;state.jobs=action.payload.jobs;state.total=action.payload.total;state.pages=action.payload.pages;}).addCase(fetchJobs.rejected,state=>{state.loading=false;}).addCase(fetchJobById.fulfilled,(state,action)=>{state.currentJob=action.payload;}).addCase(createJob.fulfilled,(state,action)=>{state.myJobs.unshift(action.payload);}).addCase(fetchMyJobs.fulfilled,(state,action)=>{state.myJobs=action.payload;}).addCase(deleteJob.fulfilled,(state,action)=>{state.myJobs=state.myJobs.filter(j=>j._id!==action.payload);});}});const clearCurrentJob=jobSlice.actions.clearCurrentJob;export{clearCurrentJob};export default jobSlice.reducer;
